APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Mar-27-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO INC.'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is off calendar as untimely per CCP 415.20(a). The motion was served by substitute service on March 5, 2014. Moving party did not add ten additional calendar days for substitute service. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
